meaning: v.使(身体)康复,使复职,使恢复名誉,使复原
examples: Considerable efforts have been made to rehabilitate patients who have suffered in this way.
Time, then, to rehabilitate the alchemists.
Rehabilitate [the poor] at the hands of the king.
They try to rehabilitate them so that they can live out their remaining years happily.
At a local gym detective Kinsey Millhone meets an accident victim trying to rehabilitate his body.
